zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Tracy於大約1315年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，他的父親William de Tracy44歲，母親Mrs. Joan De Tracy40歲。他和Ann Swynne至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1379年在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Tracy于大约1315年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，他的父亲William de Tracy44岁，母亲Mrs. Joan De Tracy40岁。他和Ann Swynne至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1379年在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Tracy was born about 1315, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, William de Tracy, was 44 and his mother, Mrs. Joan De Tracy, was 40. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ann Swynne. He died in 1379, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Tracy est né environ 1315, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Tracy, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Joan De Tracy, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ann Swynne. Il est décédé en 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Tracy um 1315 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Tracy 44 und seine Mutter Mrs. Joan De Tracy 40. Er hatte mit Ann Swynne mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1379 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Tracy è nato il circa 1315 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Tracy, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Joan De Tracy, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Ann Swynne. Morì nel 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Tracyが約1315年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父William de Tracyは44歳，母Mrs. Joan De Tracyは40歳であった。彼はAnn Swynneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1379年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Tracy(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Tracy(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Joan De Tracy(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Ann Swynne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Tracy nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Tracy, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Joan De Tracy, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Ann Swynne. Ele faleceu em 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Tracy родился около 1315 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Tracy было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Joan De Tracy, 40. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Ann Swynne. Он умер в 1379 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Tracy nació aproximadamente 1315, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Tracy, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mrs. Joan De Tracy, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Ann Swynne. Murió en 1379, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
